description: Document Recording — validates and records deeds, mortgages, liens, and other instruments against the official land record with hash integrity and notarization verification

hard_stops.label: SHA-256 Hash Mismatch
hard_stops.logic: Computed SHA-256 hash of the uploaded document does not match the declared document_hash — document may have been tampered with in transit

hard_stops.label: Grantor Not Current Vested Owner
hard_stops.logic: Grantor name does not match the current vested owner in the chain of title — conveyance by non-owner is void

hard_stops.label: Notarization Missing or Expired
hard_stops.logic: Document requires notarization but no valid notary acknowledgment is present, or the notary commission has expired

hard_stops.label: Remote Online Notarization in Restricted State
hard_stops.logic: Document was notarized via RON but the recording jurisdiction does not accept remote online notarization — must be re-notarized in person

hard_stops.label: Recording Fee Not Collected
hard_stops.logic: Recording fee has not been collected or payment has not been confirmed — document cannot be accepted for recording without payment

hard_stops.label: Lien Release by Non-Lienholder
hard_stops.logic: Lien release or satisfaction document was executed by a party that is not the recorded lienholder — release is invalid

soft_flags.label: Multiple Documents Same Parcel Same Day
soft_flags.logic: More than one recording submitted for the same parcel within 24 hours — verify recording order priority

soft_flags.label: Transfer Tax May Apply
soft_flags.logic: Document type is a deed and consideration exceeds the transfer tax exemption threshold — verify transfer tax payment
